Package io.forja.components.charts.fxGauge

Class FxGauge

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
io.forja.components.charts.fxGauge.FxGauge
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class FxGauge extends javafx.scene.layout.Region
A speedometer-style gauge — semicircular arc + needle + numeric value label. Value maps to angle [180°, 0°] across the arc.

Builder usage:

     
      FxGauge cpu = FxGauge.builder()
          .min(0).max(100).value(42)
          .arcColor(Color.web("#4F46E5"))
          .suffix("%")
          .build();
See Also:
  • FxGauge.Builder
